content.query:
SELECT
ZipCode
,City
,County
,CBSA_Name
,MSA_Name
,DeliveryResidential
,DeliveryBusiness
,DeliveryTotal
,PopulationEstimate
,ClassificationCode
,AverageHouseValue
,IncomePerHousehold
,MedianAge
,Latitude
,Longitude
,[State]
 FROM [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS]
 where 
 PrimaryRecord = 'P' AND
 [State] in ('NC','SC','TN')
